task_completion.description: Verify that the F1-ATPase structure (PDB: 1BMF) is loaded into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI is visible with a 3D macromolecule structure loaded. The object panel on the right lists '1BMF'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent identifies the bound nucleotides in the beta subunits (chains D, E, F).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL sequence viewer, command line, or object panel shows selections or queries for ligands (e.g., ANP, AMPPNP, ADP) specifically within chains D, E, and F.

task_completion.description: Verify that pairwise structural alignments of the three beta subunits are performed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL console/history shows 'align', 'super', or 'cealign' commands executed between chains D, E, and F, with RMSD values printed in the output area.

task_completion.description: Verify the visual preparation of the alpha3-beta3-gamma assembly figure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL 3D viewer shows the complex where the three beta subunits (chains D, E, F) are colored distinctly from each other to represent their states, and the gamma subunit (chain G) is visually highlighted (e.g., a unique color or representation).

task_completion.description: Verify the publication-quality figure is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or file manager shows 'atp_synthase_f1.png' in '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/' with a file size of at least 50KB, or the PyMOL console shows a successful 'png' save command directed to that exact path.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the detailed text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/f1_rotary_report.txt'. The text must be at least 10 lines long and include beta chain IDs (D, E, F), their nucleotide states, pairwise RMSD values, and a description of the rotary/binding change mechanism.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used PyMOL to perform the alignments and generate the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI open with the 1BMF structure actively manipulated and alignment outputs visible in the PyMOL console, rather than just writing a Python script without executing it.

integrity.description: Verify the RMSD values in the report come from actual calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The RMSD values written in the text report should match the alignment output numbers visible in the PyMOL console screenshots, not generic placeholders.

integrity.description: Verify the saved PNG image matches the PyMOL viewport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI viewport right before the save command is executed should match the description of the final image (color-coded beta subunits, highlighted gamma subunit).
